summary: Completed comprehensive testing of ManoBank BBVA-style registration flow. All backend APIs (14/14 tests passed) and frontend flows working correctly. Director General login navigates to /banco/sistema, registration form has 5 steps with proper validation, Aperturas tab shows BBVA badges on new registrations.
seed_data_creation: Created multiple test registrations during backend testing (prefixed with TEST_, DUP, APR)
context_for_next_testing_agent: ManoBank BBVA-style registration flow is fully functional. Key endpoints: POST /api/manobank/registro/nuevo-cliente (creates solicitud), GET /api/manobank/admin/registrations (lists registrations), POST /api/manobank/admin/registrations/{id}/approve (approves and generates IBAN + temp password). Director login bypasses 2FA. Registration form has 5 steps with field validation.

director_login.details: Login at /banco with rrhh.milchollos@gmail.com successfully navigates to /banco/sistema

registration_form.details: 5-step BBVA-style form at /manobank/registro with proper validation for DNI, email, phone

nuevo_cliente_endpoint.details: POST /api/manobank/registro/nuevo-cliente creates solicitud with SOL-YYYYMMDD-XXXXXXXX format

registrations_list_endpoint.details: GET /api/manobank/admin/registrations returns list with stats (total, pending, approved, rejected)

approve_endpoint.details: POST /api/manobank/admin/registrations/{id}/approve generates Spanish IBAN (ES + 20 digits) and 8-char temp password

aperturas_tab.details: Shows registrations with BBVA badge, Aprobar/Rechazar buttons, and IBAN for approved ones

field_validation.details: Required fields, email format, phone format (must start with 6 or 7) all validated

mocked_apis.twilio_sms: SMS via Twilio may not send if not configured - falls back to debug mode showing code in console
